title: Australian-Style Midnight Jelly Dessert
description: A unique dessert inspired by Australian flavors, perfect for midnight cravings. This Italian dessert combines crunchy biscotti with a creamy custard and sweet jelly.
instructions: Bake the biscotti for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
In a medium saucepan, combine the custard powder, milk, and sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the jelly crystals.
Let the mixture cool slightly before serving.
Serve the chilled custard jelly over the baked biscotti.
